bossInclusionRule.selection: The first enemy template in each canonical encounter is the distinct boss; temporary weak points, wards, clerks, and clones remain supporting actors.

encounterMappings.label: TITHE HOUND
encounterMappings.phaseRead: Latch opens and rib plates flare during the frantic transition.

encounterMappings.label: FATHER MATEUS AVELAR
encounterMappings.phaseRead: The coat opens around a broken court key as the final nonlethal phase begins.

encounterMappings.label: CAPTAIN KAJI
encounterMappings.phaseRead: Spool brake releases into an open warning frame before the final pull.

encounterMappings.label: WIDOW OF FOG
encounterMappings.phaseRead: Ribbons invert between high- and low-tide silhouettes.

encounterMappings.label: FURNACE ABBOT
encounterMappings.phaseRead: Overheat opens three vent plates and buckles the rake-side shoulder.

encounterMappings.label: MAGISTRATE UJIRO
encounterMappings.phaseRead: The command case opens and the baton line breaks when orders are interrupted.

encounterMappings.label: BELL WARDEN CHIYO
encounterMappings.phaseRead: Yoke dampers separate and the binding reels expose their break pins.

encounterMappings.label: LADY ENMA OF ASH
encounterMappings.phaseRead: Paired vane colors divide around the reservoir before converging.

encounterMappings.label: YEARLESS BELL
encounterMappings.phaseRead: Sockets open in a square sequence as the protected nodes fall.

encounterMappings.label: SHOGUN KUROZANE
encounterMappings.phaseRead: Court panels split, network keys rise, and the final dawn break exposes the central seam.

safety.construction: Invented mechanical, docket, cable, lattice, ash, and fog geometry only.
